headline: Gilead's Earnings Skyrocket as Florida’s AIDS Drug Program Falters, says AHF
summary: LOS ANGELES, May 05, 2026--Gilead's Earnings per Share Expected to Be Up 52% as Florida’s and other States’ AIDS Drug Programs Falters, says AHF

headline: Use of Gilead's HIV prevention shot rises, but US insurance gaps remain
summary: Use of Gilead Sciences'Yeztugo, a twice-yearly injection to prevent HIV infection, hasclimbed since its June launch, but U.S. health providers say notall patients are interested in the new option...

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Avoid
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.
